prose.en: Handle device identification and authentication based on attestation by {param:ia-03.04_odp}.

guidance.en: Device attestation refers to the identification and authentication of a device based on its configuration and known operating state. Device attestation can be determined via a cryptographic hash of the device. If device attestation is the means of identification and authentication, then it is important that patches and updates to the device are handled via a configuration management process such that the patches and updates are done securely and do not disrupt identification and authentication to other devices.

prose.en: device identification and authentication are handled based on attestation by {param:ia-03.04_odp}.

objects.en: procedures addressing device identification and authentication
system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with operational responsibilities for device identification and authentication
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing device identification and authentication capabilities
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing configuration management

guidelines.en: configuration management process to be employed to handle device identification and authentication based on attestation is defined;
